narrative:
Madison Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,384 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
